signals.snippet: Subject: Re: Urgent Catch up required\n\nBody: I asked to cancel my account a couple of months ago. Larry Harris Operations Manager  Serenity Rx Spa 3096 Brickhouse Ct  Virginia Beach, VA 23452 From: Sudha Goutami <sudha.g@zoca.com> Sent: M

cause_analysis.narrative: Serenity Rx Spa churned on 2026-02-13 after 188 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-03-03 via email — -18 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Implement a 'cancellation keyword' realtime alert to AMs + Growth team. Today this signal is discovered only post-churn.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
